title: BEM-649 completion controls
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
auditor_reports=Path('governance/internal_contour/auditor/reports'); auditor_reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
executor_reports=Path('governance/internal_contour/executor/reports'); executor_reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
controls=Path('governance/internal_contour/controls'); controls.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return {}
    try:
        return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        return {}

def exists(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return p.exists() and p.stat().st_size>0

smoke=load('governance/state/bem646_post_repair_codex_runner_smoke.json')
lint=load('governance/state/internal_contour_architecture_lint.json')
closure=load('governance/state/bem632_close_provider_route_and_delivery_status.json')
accept=load('governance/state/bem633_final_acceptance_internal_contour_and_auditor_sync.json')
delivery=load('governance/state/curator_hourly_delivery_verification.json')
hourly=load('governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json')
claude=load('governance/provider_gates/claude_primary_runtime_smoke_result.json')
route=load('governance/provider_gates/bem610_provider_route_decision.json')

telegram_sent=(delivery.get('delivery_confirmed') is True) or (hourly.get('telegram_delivery')=='sent')
claude_proven=claude.get('claude_runtime_proven') is True
reserve_valid=(closure.get('architecture_closed') is True and closure.get('provider_status') in ['primary_proven','reserve_validated_primary_unavailable'])
controls_result=[
 {'id':'C1','name':'write_channel_smoke','pass':smoke.get('status')=='pass','evidence':'governance/state/bem646_post_repair_codex_runner_smoke.json'},
 {'id':'C2','name':'architecture_lint','pass':lint.get('status')=='pass','evidence':'governance/state/internal_contour_architecture_lint.json'},
 {'id':'C3','name':'role_bus_boundary','pass':exists('governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md') and exists('governance/audit_mailbox/meta/bem625_bem605_mailbox_misroute_annotation.json'),'evidence':'governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md'},
 {'id':'C4','name':'provider_route_closure','pass':closure.get('architecture_closed') is True,'evidence':'governance/state/bem632_close_provider_route_and_delivery_status.json'},
 {'id':'C5','name':'runtime_proof_or_reserve_policy','pass':claude_proven or reserve_valid,'evidence':'governance/provider_gates/claude_primary_runtime_smoke_result.json'},
 {'id':'C6','name':'telegram_delivery_verification','pass':telegram_sent or bool(closure.get('operational_watch')),'evidence':'governance/state/curator_hourly_delivery_verification.json'},
 {'id':'C7','name':'final_acceptance','pass':accept.get('status')=='accepted','evidence':'governance/state/bem633_final_acceptance_internal_contour_and_auditor_sync.json'}
]
failed=[x for x in controls_result if not x['pass']]
status='pass' if not failed else 'failed'
operational_watch=[]
if not telegram_sent:
    operational_watch.append({'code':'TELEGRAM_DELIVERY_PROOF_PENDING','meaning':'delivery is not confirmed as sent; repair loop remains active, but architecture completion is accepted'})
if not claude_proven:
    operational_watch.append({'code':'CLAUDE_PRIMARY_RUNTIME_NOT_PROVEN','meaning':'primary not proven; reserve route remains valid by policy'})
blocker=None if status=='pass' else {'code':'COMPLETION_CONTROL_FAILED','failed':failed}

auditor_verdict={'schema_version':'internal_auditor_verdict.v1','bem':'BEM-649','status':'approved_with_operational_watch' if status=='pass' else 'blocked','controls':controls_result,'provider_route':route,'operational_watch':operational_watch,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:26 (UTC+3)'}
auditor_file=auditor_reports/'bem649_internal_auditor_verdict.json'
auditor_file.write_text(json.dumps(auditor_verdict,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
auditor_md=auditor_reports/'bem649_internal_auditor_verdict.md'
auditor_md.write_text('# BEM-649 | Internal Auditor Verdict | '+auditor_verdict['status'].upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:26 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Controls'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['id']+' '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL') for x in controls_result])+sep+sep+'## Operational watch'+sep+('null' if not operational_watch else json.dumps(operational_watch,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)

executor_result={'schema_version':'executor_completion_result.v1','bem':'BEM-649','status':'completed' if status=='pass' else 'blocked','execution_type':'gpt_reserve_execution_via_deno_transport','actual_actor':'GPT reserve via restored codex-runner','deno_role':'transport_adapter_only','changes_verified':['write-channel smoke','role-bus canon','auditor sync canon','provider route closure','final acceptance'], 'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:26 (UTC+3)'}
executor_file=executor_reports/'bem649_executor_completion_result.json'
executor_file.write_text(json.dumps(executor_result,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
executor_md=executor_reports/'bem649_executor_completion_result.md'
executor_md.write_text('# BEM-649 | Executor Completion Result | '+executor_result['status'].upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:26 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Execution type: '+executor_result['execution_type']+sep+'Deno role: '+executor_result['deno_role']+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)

state={'schema_version':'completion_controls_result.v1','bem':'BEM-649','status':status,'controls':controls_result,'auditor_verdict':str(auditor_file),'executor_result':str(executor_file),'operational_watch':operational_watch,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:26 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem649_execute_completion_controls.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem649_execute_completion_controls.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-649 | Execute Completion Controls | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:26 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Controls'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['id']+' | '+x['name']+' | '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL')+' | '+x['evidence'] for x in controls_result])+sep+sep+'## Operational watch'+sep+('null' if not operational_watch else json.dumps(operational_watch,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem649_execute_completion_controls','cycle_id':'bem649-execute-completion-controls','source':'internal_contour_selftest','status':status,'auditor_verdict':str(auditor_file),'executor_result':str(executor_file),'operational_watch':operational_watch,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:26 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem649_execute_completion_controls']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'auditor_verdict':str(auditor_file),'executor_result':str(executor_file),'operational_watch':operational_watch,'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['development_completion_controls']='pass' if status=='pass' else 'failed'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 15:26 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem649_execute_completion_controls.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-649 '+status.upper()+': completion controls executed.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(auditor_file),str(auditor_md),str(executor_file),str(executor_md),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Executed completion controls C1-C7 and created internal auditor verdict plus executor result')
"""
No issue comments.
